items.name: Priya Venkatesan
items.text: The meals taste exactly like my mother's cooking. I've subscribed for 3 months now and the quality has never dropped. Fresh, hot and genuinely homemade.

items.name: Rahul Krishnan
items.text: We ordered catering for our office of 40 people. On time, perfectly packed and everyone loved the food. Arusuvai is now our default lunch partner.

items.name: Lakshmi Subramanian
items.text: Booked them for my daughter's birthday — the spread was stunning and the taste was pure home. Guests kept asking where the food was from!

items.name: Karthik Raja
items.text: As a bachelor living alone, this has been a lifesaver. The food is fresh, properly packed and tastes like proper home food. Ordering on WhatsApp is so easy.

items.name: Anjali Murthy
items.text: The monthly plan is worth every rupee. The menu rotates so I never get bored, and I can skip a day with one WhatsApp message.

items.name: Suresh Iyer
items.text: Ordered for our apartment community festival — 60 meals. Everything was hot, fresh and delicious. Highly recommend for any community event.
